name: Han Dynasty
note: Established Confucianism as state ideology and the civil examination system — the template all later Chinese dynasties followed

figures.name: Liu Bang (Emperor Gaozu)
figures.significance: Rose from peasant to emperor; the Han ethnic identity is named after his dynasty

figures.name: Emperor Wu of Han
figures.significance: Established Confucianism as state ideology; opened the Silk Road

figures.name: Sima Qian
figures.significance: Father of Chinese historiography; his Records of the Grand Historian defined the writing of Chinese history for 2000 years
